issue.title: www.elconfidencial.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.elconfidencial.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.elconfidencial.com%2F) ### Comment > Main webpage for Spanish newspaper El confidencial.com. Video player (all I can see when inspecting it is a reference to "Aria") starts with a Video image that quickly disappears, then "Loading.." on a blank screen, then the error message (but there's no network error actually and I have symmetric 600 Mbps fiber link with AC Wifi on an LG Gram i9 laptop). Edge is last version. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/engxou441jc4sgk80go84kk8kc4o00s9l5pks9lg64.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/do00m7omfmgccggkcw8so08sks0cksknzbx56fa9es.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.96 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Edge Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Spanish/Portuguese filter,
AdGuard French filter Filters last update: | 2026-07-13T08:00:46Z Other extensions used: | `None (tested with all extensions disabled except Extensity)` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.96&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=3&browser=edge&regular_filters=2%2C9%2C10%2C16&filters_last_update=2026-07-13T08%3A00%3A46Z&stealth.enabled=0)

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: www.daily.co.jp

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.elconfidencial.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.elconfidencial.com%2F) ### Comment > Main webpage for Spanish newspaper El confidencial.com. Video player (all I can see when inspecting it is a reference to "Aria") starts with a Video image that quickly disappears, then "Loading.." on a blank screen, then the error message (but there's no network error actually and I have symmetric 600 Mbps fiber link with AC Wifi on an LG Gram i9 laptop). comment.body:
> Хочу заблокировать новости и новостной поток на главной странице mail.

Можно вот так. Скопируйте в пользовательский фильтр:

```adblock
||dzen.ru^$domain=mail.ru
||media-trend.mail.ru/api/
mail.ru##.feed__content
mail.ru##.grid_newscol
mail.ru##.tabs__container
||static.pulse.mail.ru/cached/pulse-lenta.
! курс валют
mail.ru##.micro-widgets
! поиск
mail.ru##.search-frame
```

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://api.powerups.club/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapi.powerups.club%2F) ### Comment > ### Problem Description > The domain `api.powerups.club` is currently suffering from a false positive block by the upstream AdGuard DNS infrastructure (`dns.adguard.com`), resolving to the AdGuard security block page IP (`94.140.14.33`). > > This is a legitimate API endpoint used by Axon Logistics to securely share business documents for external use. It does not contain any malware, tracking scripts, or phishing risks. > > ### Steps to Reproduce > 1. Use AdGuard public DNS upstream servers. > 2. Attempt to resolve or connect to `api.powerups.club`. > 3. The DNS queries are hijacked and rewritten to `94.140.14.33`. > 4. Over HTTPS, this triggers a strict browser handshake failure (`SSL_ERROR_INTERNAL_ERROR_ALERT`). Over plain HTTP, it reveals the "Dangerous website" AdGuard block page (as shown in the uploaded screenshot). > > Please review and remove this domain from the upstream blocklists. Thank you! ``` Username: @Bluetinity ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/jr4zucbl70g40084kcwwwok0owo0gw8i0mpdjsqm7k.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/hdmo5dvsg0g8wws4k8wwgs8gccogokodhavtsy8e00.png?nc=1)

Other ad blocker ### AdGuard version * ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed analytics or tracker ### Which browser(s) do you use? other (specify in comment below) ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? facebook app ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots facebook sonar domains are used for analytics. they have been all blocked in hagezi ultimatel list since may 11 2026. the -sonar domains have been blocked since january 9 2026 in hagezi ultimate list i have 3 heavy facebook app users on my network including myself who use facebook and haven't run into ONE single problem. now. the problem is they have over 4k different subdomains for the sonar ones and 34k for snr ones. but all of them can easily be blocked with two simple filters: ||sonar * .fbcdn.net^ -sonar.snr.fbcdn.net^ the above two filters blocks the different sonar variations they use without adding multiple different variations of filters. i have uploaded a list of them all to show you just how many of the different tracking subdomains their are. here is the list for the sonar ones: https://justpaste.it/fqegl here is a link for virus total their are 34k snr.fbcdn.net ones: https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/snr.fbcdn.net/relations ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

Other ad blocker ### AdGuard version * ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed analytics or tracker ### Which browser(s) do you use? other (specify in comment below) ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? facebook app ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots facebook sonar domains are used for analytics. they have been all blocked in hagezi ultimatel list since may 11 2026. the -sonar domains have been blocked since january 9 2026 in hagezi ultimate list i have 3 heavy facebook app users on my network including myself who use facebook and haven't run into ONE single problem. now. the problem is they have over 4k different subdomains for the sonar ones and 34k for snr ones. but all of them can easily be blocked with two simple filters: ||sonar * .fbcdn.net^ -sonar.snr.fbcdn.net^ the above two filters blocks the different sonar variations they use without adding multiple different variations of filters. i have uploaded a list of them all to show you just how many of the different tracking subdomains their are. here is the list for the sonar ones: https://justpaste.it/fqegl here is a link for virus total their are 34k snr.fbcdn.net ones: https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/snr.fbcdn.net/relations ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
Fixed in https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/commit/f9ce117a6f42c05ebbb37658079b7827f4464cb1

Due to Google policy, MV3 extension cannot update filters, so new rules will be available in one of the next extension updates.
Until then, please add following rules to user rules:
```adblock
/js/ads/admaven.js$domain=mangabats.com|mangakakalot.gg|mangakakalove.com|manganato.gg|natomanga.com|nelomanga.net
/vendor/widget/loader.js$domain=mangabats.com|mangakakalot.gg|mangakakalove.com|manganato.gg|natomanga.com|nelomanga.net
```

issue.title: Add tracking redirect bypass rules for www.awin1.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

URLs from www.awin1.com are affiliate tracking redirects that wrap the actual
destination in a URL-encoded `ued=` query parameter, routing users through
Awin's servers before reaching the target page.

Example tracking URL:
https://www.awin1.com/cread.php?awinmid=15135&awinaffid=169249&clickref=ppr-fr-1893524464&ued=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.e.leclerc%2Fmag%2Fe-leclerc-comboire

Expected destination:
https://www.e.leclerc/mag/e-leclerc-comboire



### Proposed solution

Using $urltransform rules to decode the URL-encoded destination and redirect directly,
following the same pattern already used for digidip.net:

```
||www.awin1.com/cread.php?*ued=$urltransform=pct|/^https?:\/\/(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*?.*\.awin1\.com.*[?&]ued=([^&]*).*/\$1/|pct
```

### Additional information

Tested and working. Awin (formerly Affiliate Window) is one of the largest
affiliate networks in Europe and the UK, widely used by deal/coupon sites
(Dealabs, Hotukdeals, etc.), so this would benefit a large number of users.

comment.body:
> So we should keep the first `pct|` right?

It seems, in this case.



> I had to install the beta version of Adguard for Mac and now both filters are indeed working.

v2.19.0 with CL 1.20 was released few days ago.

https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardForMac/releases/tag/v2.19.0

issue.title: 9gag.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://az1.zona.pub/?ref=share](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faz1.zona.pub%2F%3Fref%3Dshare) ### Comment > Здравствуйте, после 1 запуска Zona любой фильм или сериал источник спокойно включается, но стоит выйти из него и ещё включить его или любой другой ИСТОЧНИК появляется предупреждение чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы. Приходится принудительно через настройки закрывать Zona и ещё раз открывать и также тоже самое 1 запуск нормально, потом всё также. На компьютере с Zona и adguard таких проблем вообще нет. Менял DNS, он также баннер показывает чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы, либо вообще ничего не открывает. Исправьте ситуацию 🙏 (на скриншотах как смог всё изложил по полочкам). ### Screenshots

labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.paramountplus.com/movies/video/6_YWAktXgebdiSgeOmcegpTJouXhh2Ql/#open](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.paramountplus.com%2Fmovies%2Fvideo%2F6_YWAktXgebdiSgeOmcegpTJouXhh2Ql%2F%23open) ### Comment > ### Issue: Required Paramount Plus domains fail to resolve when AdGuard is enabled > > When AdGuard system‑wide protection is enabled (via the system tray), several required Paramount Plus domains fail to resolve. Disabling AdGuard only in the browser does not resolve the issue — DNS resolution continues to fail until AdGuard is fully disabled at the system level. > > ### Observed behavior > - DNS lookups for required Paramount Plus domains return **REFUSED** when AdGuard system‑wide protection is active. > - Browser‑level AdGuard disabling has no effect. > - Once AdGuard is disabled system‑wide, DNS resolution succeeds and Paramount Plus begins working normally. > > ### Impact > Attempting to play any content on Paramount Plus results in: > - The player spinning for several seconds > - Playback failing and returning to the play button > - Playback working normally once AdGuard system‑wide protection is disabled > > ### Additional details > Screenshots attached showing DNS refusal for one of the required domains. > ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/j6w7ax73omosgoss8c4wgsgk8wooswk6wrx1o8521c.png?nc=1)

labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? Other ad blocker ### AdGuard version * ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed analytics or tracker ### Which browser(s) do you use? other (specify in comment below) ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? facebook app ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots facebook sonar domains are used for analytics. they have been all blocked in hagezi ultimatel list since may 11 2026. the -sonar domains have been blocked since january 9 2026 in hagezi ultimate list i have 3 heavy facebook app users on my network including myself who use facebook and haven't run into ONE single problem. now. the problem is they have over 4k different subdomains for the sonar ones and 34k for snr ones. but all of them can easily be blocked with two simple filters: ||sonar * .fbcdn.net^ -sonar.snr.fbcdn.net^ the above two filters blocks the different sonar variations they use without adding multiple different variations of filters. i have uploaded a list of them all to show you just how many of the different tracking subdomains their are. here is the list for the sonar ones: https://justpaste.it/fqegl here is a link for virus total their are 34k snr.fbcdn.net ones: https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/snr.fbcdn.net/relations ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body: the sonar domaimns been all blocked in hagezi ultimatel list since may 11 2026. the -sonar domains have been blocked since january 9 2026 meaning i have been using facebook with these blocked for a while. so they are pretty well tested. @Alex-302

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body: > AdGuard causes Twitch to show "Browser not supported" when using Firefox Developer Edition. This is because Twitch's bot detection is kicking in thinking you are a bot ("failed integrity check" error appears from network requests if you are already logged in and try do different actions, and a more vague "browser not supported" for when you are logged out). Twitch uses Kasada bot detection and appears to be blocking or otherwise disrupting the results of those browser checks. Disabling AdGuard fixes the problem. Not reproduced on my end. Is it related to settings?
